programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Best Man/Cool Party: The Coach wants to remarry Tish and asks Arnold to be his best man./ Rhonda has a party and only invites the cool kids.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Sid''s Revenge/Roller Coaster: After Arnold accidentally embarrasses Sid, Sid seeks revenge./ Eugene wants to ride with the gang, but they all think he''s a jinx and won''t go with him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Grandpa's Birthday/Road Trip: Grandpa thinks he's going to die soon because no one in his family ever made it past his age. He prepares to die, and Arnold tries to convince him that life is still worth living.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold and Lila/Grand Prix: Helga, lost in a love reverie, writes "Arnold loves Helga" on a wall, but changes the name to "Lila" when the kids approach. Lila thinks that Arnold loves her until he explains the mistake.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Girl Trouble/School Dance: Arnold tells Grandpa he''s tired of dealing with Helga''s nonsense. Grandpa tells Arnold a story about a girl he had to deal with when he was a kid who treated him the same way. She turns out to be Grandma.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Helga's Show/Flood: Helga does a standup routine at a school function and proceeds to insult all of her friends. They are offended, prompting her to change her act to a more friendly and gentle routine. She performs the new act, but it's boring.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga perform a \"Romeo and Juliet\"- type play for a school production

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: At the Parent's Day competition, Arnold learns that even though he doesn't have \"real\" parents, his grandparents are just as good as everyone else's parents.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Eugene's Birthday/Stinky's Pumpkin
programme.desc: Eugene's Birthday: Arnold is the cause of two birthday party's for Eugene being a big flop. Stinky's Pumpkin: Stinky feels that he is a failure at everything he does until Arnold helps him discover that he is the best pumpkin grower in town.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Dinner for Four/Phoebe Skips
programme.desc: Dinner for Four: After winning coupons to a fancy French restaurant, Helga attempts to prove to Arnold that she is more sophisticated than Lila. Phoebe Skips: Helga is devastated when her patsy, Phoebe, is skipped to the 6th grade.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Full Moon/Student Teacher
programme.desc: Full moon: When the gang all decide that they are going to "moon" Principal Wartz, Arnold thinks that it's a bad idea, but ends up inadvertently getting caught and taking the blame. Student Teacher: Olga comes to PS 118 to be a student teacher.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Big Gino/Jamie O in Luv
programme.desc: Big Gino: Sid gets in over his head when doing business with the local kid loan shark, Big Gino. Jamie O in Luv: Gerald's big brother, Jamie O, falls for a girl and suddenly turns nice to his kid brother.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Beeper Queen/Oscar Can't Read?
programme.desc: Beeper Queen: Big Bob pulls his back and cannot go to a very important meeting. Not knowing who else to send in his place, he asks Helga. Oscar Can't Read?: When Arnold discovers that Oskar has been pretending to know how to read, Arnold confronts him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: The Headless Cabbie/Friday the 13th
programme.desc: The Headless Cabbie: Wolfgang dares Arnold and the gang to break superstitions, which causes a spate of bad luck to erupt. Friday the 13th: At a sleepover, Arnold and the boys sit around and tell scary stories.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Parrot/Chocolate Turtles
programme.desc: Helga's Parrot: Big Bob gets a pesky parrot he passes to Helga, who confides in it about Arnold. Chocolate Turtles: Arnold and Gerald sell chocolate turtles to fund their go-cart project.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Love and Cheese/Weighing Harold
programme.desc: Love and Cheese: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Weighing Harold: Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: It Girl/Deconstructing Arnold
programme.desc: It Girl: Helga becomes the latest child fashion star and everyone loves her for her scowl and bad attitude. Deconstructing Arnold: The gang finally gets sick of Arnold's never-ending good advice, so they all decide to stop listening to him all together.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grudge Match/Polishing Rhonda
programme.desc: Grudge Match: Arnold and Grandpa vs Helga and Big Bob in a fender bender blame game. Polishing Rhonda: Rhonda and Patty's rivalry heats up at finishing school.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Back to School/Egg Story
programme.desc: Back To School: Grandpa returns to grade school so he can finally fulfill his dream of graduating. Egg Story: Mr. Simmons gives the class an assignment to couple up and take care of an egg over the weekend to learn teamwork and responsibility.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Weird Cousin/Baby Oskar
programme.desc: Weird Cousin: Arnold's weird cousin, Arnie, arrives for a visit and appears to be the biggest loser to everyone except Lila, the love of Arnold's life. Baby Oskar: Oskar's wife Susie agrees to watch her cousin's baby, also named Oskar.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga Sleepwalks/Fighting Families
programme.desc: Helga Sleepwalks: Helga begins to sleepwalk and ends up walking to Arnold's house. Fighting Families: The Fighting Families Contest has come to town and have selected two families: one from PS 118 and PS 119.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Monkeyman!/Buses, Bikes, Subways
programme.desc: Monkeyman!: Arnold is saved from thugs by a mysterious, caped character named Monkeyman. Buses, Bikes, Subways: Out on a field trip, Harold and Helga miss the bus and get separated from the rest of the class.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Grandpa's Sister/Synchronized Swimming
programme.desc: Grandpa's sister: Mitzi arrives unexpectedly at the boarding house. Synchronized Swimming: Coach Wittenberg recruits Arnold's gang for a synchronized swim team.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga's Masquerade/Mr. Green Runs
programme.desc: Helga's Masquerade: When Helga realizes that Arnold is so taken by Lila because of her wit and charm, she decides that the only way to get Arnold to notice her is to be like Lila. Mr. Green Runs: Arnold helps Mr. Green run for the City Council.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Helga On The Couch
programme.desc: Helga is recommended for counseling after Mr. Simmons observes her berating Arnold, arguing with her parents, etc. She learns that unrequited love is very normal and that she's actually okay.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Dino Checks Out
programme.desc: Washed up balladeer Dino Spumoni fakes his own death in order to increase his record sales. Everyone believes he's dead and at the funeral, Grandpa and Arnold find out that Dino has left Arnold all his future record sales.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!: Summer Love
programme.desc: By complete coincidence, Arnold and Helga and family end up at the same beach resort for summer vacation. Helga is ecstatic until Arnold meets Summer, the girl of his dreams.

programme.title: Hey Arnold!
programme.desc: After a chilling vampire movie, Sid is so spooked that he believes that Stinky has all of the characteristics of a vampire. Olga comes home and wants to be a big sister to a little girl.

programme.title: Big Time Rush
programme.desc: Spending all their time together since moving to LA has given guys cabin fever, so they decide to spend some time apart.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: In an attempt to get around her moms no TV rule in the Darling home for a week, Clarissa connects her computer to the cable converter and nearly blows up the house.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Although she's too young for a driver's license, Clarissa is consumed by the desire to acquire a 1976 Gremlin she finds in the want-ads.

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All

programme.title: Clarissa Explains It All
programme.desc: Bully: When a greedy bully forces Ferguson to hand over his big sister's walkman, Clarissa decides to stand up and fight. It's not her fists but her spirit that KO's the bully, and he winds up falling for Clarissa.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel
programme.desc: Kenan's parents are celebrating their 17th wedding anniversary. Roger really wants to impress Sheryl, so he visits a friend who owns a jewelry store.

programme.title: Kenan & Kel

programme.title: Kenan & Kel

programme.title: Kenan & Kel

programme.title: All Grown Up
programme.desc: April Fools' Day has always been a big hit with the 'Rats. Only this year, no one knows who is pranking whom when everyone seems to be collaborating on secret plans to have the greatest prank.

programme.title: All Grown Up

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Kate Bliss and Paul Laidlaw's final trip sees them through Kent. At an incredible auction in Bury St. Edmunds, the Antiques Road Trip record profit is truly smashed, and when the gavel finally goes down one expert is left close to tears.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton are in the Scottish Borders with a '60s Jaguar. James resorts to a flashlight as he rummages in the dark for an occasional table while Christina hopes some silver-plated cutlery will serve up a profit.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton's are in the cold and snowy Trossachs. James investigates some ancient treasures in a Glasgow graveyard and farmer's wife Christina learns why it was the Scots who transformed arable farming.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion and James Braxton start in Levenshulme, Manchester. James has the unusual problem of having too much cash, while Christina struggles with her limited funds, deciding to gamble them on a worn toy train.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The seaside town of Southport in Merseyside is Christina Trevanion and James Braxton's next stop. Christina dibs her way to a purchase with a Scouting connection and James spends a vast amount of his cash on two Cantonese jardinières.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: In Whitley Bay, Christina Trevanion and James Braxton set off on their finale. Christina buys a Chinese silver bowl and James has found six Japanese porcelain teacups. After their buying spree, they head to Ayr for a memorable auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell is joined by new Road Tripper Arusha Irvine on a jaunt around Herefordshire's antique shops in a 1976 Triumph Stag. Phil's joined by Daphne, his dog, while Roo finds a 300-year-old example of Georgian glass.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Road Trip regular, Phil Serrell, plays a safe bet with a mahogany breakfast table, while Arusha 'Roo' Irvine's all at sea, gambling on an antique pond yacht.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Roo Irvine and Phil Serrell explore Yorkshire and Derbyshire. Along the way they dig up coal mining musical history, Phil attempts to buy a horse and Roo picks up another piece of her favorite glassware.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Phil Serrell and Roo Irvine explore Oxfordshire. However, will the Stratford upon Avon auction supply comedy, tragedy or both? Plus, how the Chipping Norton Scouts re-invented British baseball and the Queen of 19th-century science.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: As Roo Irvine and Phil Serrell motor through the Cotswolds, Phil picks up a Victorian marmalade cutter, while Roo hopes a 16th-century bronze thimble will earn her a big profit. But who will be victorious at the final auction in Newent?

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross and James Braxton, in a bright red classic Alfa Romeo, visit some of the county's finest antique shops. They explore a cold war submarine and discover how Pocahontas came to Kent, before arriving at an auction in West Sussex.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Charlie Ross, James Braxton and their little Red Alfa, called Nelly, take in some of the finest Roman mosaics in Britain and discover the story of an Arts and Crafts masterpiece, before whizzing towards a Wokingham auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: James Braxton and Charlie Ross are shopping from Buckinghamshire to the Cotswolds. Charlie buys something he calls "ghastly," and James makes a purchase purely on his sense of smell. Will these strange strategies pay off at the auction?

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Treasures featured include Chinese objects which revealed a shocking family secret and rare artworks by the sculptor Elisabeth Frink.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team return to Scone Palace in Perthshire, Scotland, which provides an imposing backdrop for a roadshow brimming with beautiful treasures.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include a pair of Clarice Cliff bookends won in a pub darts tournament, a silver Christening cup with a surprising history and a portrait by a renowned British artist, painted on a fragment of a pillowcase in a prisoner of war camp.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include two paintings of the Titanic, a bamboo pot and a piece of "Star Wars" memorabilia.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The Roadshow returns to Chenies Manor near Amersham in Buckinghamshire where they discover a forgotten train set, a dazzling piece of Whitefriars glass and a 19th century plant stand that provides one of the biggest surprises of the series.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce meets families with poignant stories of courage and humanity in wartime; letters, photographs, paintings and everyday family items provide an intimate and revealing insight into the events of WWI and their impact on a generation.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Tredegar House near Newport in Wales provides the backdrop for a show that includes a carved coconut and a frog-shaped brooch, the story of a daring D-Day raid as told by a veteran Commando and a tapestry woven in tribute to rock band Status Quo.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Mark Hill hears the remarkable story of Joseph Briggs, an Accrington engraver who emigrated to America to work for Tiffany; Fiona Bruce examines a collection of cut-throat razors; a `Lone Ranger' fanatic shares his vast collection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Finds include a Rolex, a ring by one of the world's great jewelers and an old train ticket.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce finds out what happened to a striking piece of Banksy street art that appeared in Bristol in May and there's exciting news about a Fabergé egg discovered at the Wentworth Woodhouse show by jewelery specialist Geoffrey Munn.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team visit Durham Cathedral where treasures include a sweetheart brooch linked to the Grenadier Guards, a giant Victorian penknife, and secret documents that offer new information about the D-Day landings.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team return to Waltham Forest Town Hall where a busy day reveals an art deco pendant with a hint of ancient Egypt, a haul of charming tiles discovered behind a chimney and a purse that saved the life of a German soldier in the First World War.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona and the team visit the Liverpool Metropolitan Cathedral, where treasures include a miniature kitchen range, a piece of the city's heritage found in a French flea market and a sextant used at sea in the race to rescue survivors of the Titanic.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El delator
programme.desc: Mientras Frank se enfrenta a un denunciante de la policía de Nueva York que afirma tener pruebas de abuso de poder en la organización, Danny y Báez investigan el caso de una mujer que fue atropellada por un coche en circunstancias sospechosas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Culpable por asociación
programme.desc: Cuando un testigo clave en el caso de Danny es asesinado justo antes de testificar, Erin enfurece a Danny al pedirle ayuda a Anthony (Steve Schrippa) para encontrar al asesino.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Negocios personales
programme.desc: Después de que Emily Harrison (Danielle Savre) le dice a Danny y Baez que teme que su ex novio abusivo vuelva a comportarse de la misma manera con su nueva novia, Emily se convierte en la principal sospechosa cuando él es asesinado.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando tres empleados de restaurantes mueren en un robo/homicidio en Las Vegas, Nevada, la UAC busca pistas en un caso cerrado que sucedió en la ciudad hace seis años.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC investiga incidentes de cadáveres que son incorporados en el macabro arte del graffiti en Detroit, sospechan que un escurridizo, pero notorio artista callejero podría ser el sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a una mujer en una pequeña ciudad de Florida, habitada enteramente por delincuentes sexuales, La UAC se enfrenta a una comunidad repleta de sospechosos. Además, Lewis tiene una oportunidad profesional que puede llevarla lejos de la UAC.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC ayuda a la hija periodista de Rossi, Joy (Amber Stevens West), a investigar la desaparición de una alumna de la universidad.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El asesinato de un teniente de la Marina es grabado por una cámara de seguridad del Pentágono; Gibbs revela que la agente Barrett y su equipo se harán cargo de un caso relacionado con un asesino en serie.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que el ex compañero de Tony, Danny Price, aparezca como la última víctima del Asesino Puerto a Puerto, éste revisa sus días como detective en Baltimore, incluyendo su primer encuentro con Gibbs.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que nuevas pruebas revelen que el asesino de Puerto a Puerto se ha infiltrado en la agencia, los equipos del NCIS siguen todas las pistas en una carrera por localizarlo.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, las vidas de los miembros del NCIS corren peligro cuando se enfrentan cara a cara con el infame asesino de Puerto a Puerto.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Confesiones
programme.desc: Frank se queda con poca información para encontrar a un niño desaparecido cuando un sacerdote conflictuado que podría ayudar se niega a romper el sello de confesión.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Pérdida irreparable
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Frank, el crítico más abierto de la comunidad afroamericana, el Reverendo Darnell Potter (Ato Essandoh), es asesinado, Potter debe dejar de lado su relación controvertida con la familia Reagan para obtener justicia para su hijo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver tries to escape through an occupied driveway, a man and his dad are found possessing more than just drugs, and five teenagers learn how weed can impact their future.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police break up a street-racing ring, a driver tries to make light of his drug-possession charge, and a woman with a felony arrest warrant is fixated on her oral hygiene.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An innocent conversation turns into a high-speed motorcycle chase, a driver gets ratted out by his passengers, and a series of bad decisions land a young man in hot water.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop leads to a foot chase, a driver found with meth narcs on his passenger who has warrants, and a 17-year-old is caught driving without a permit.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect tries to ditch his stash in a laundromat, a nervous driver arouses suspicion, and a woman returning home from a night out finds her boyfriend has changed the locks.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing suspect claims to be a federal informant, officers inspect an erratically driven car and find a safe, and a familiar face swears this time she's going to rehab.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers dress a naked man who is causing a disturbance, a barefoot man denies evading police, and an intoxicated woman and her husband tell two different stories.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police search for a passenger who fled from a traffic stop, a driver not wearing a seatbelt finds himself in more trouble, and detectives respond to a domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police chase a man running away from his car and a warrant, a driver is just as unlicensed as his vehicle, and a domestic violence call involves two lovers and a hammer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A shoplifter flees on foot after stealing kids' shoes, an erratic driver has a concealed firearm (and something less concealed), and a man on probation gets his car searched.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver theorizes about America after fleeing a traffic stop, charges keep adding up for an unlicensed driver, and a woman stops at nothing to get to her trailer.

programme.title: Novia a la fuga

programme.title: Ghost: la sombra del amor

programme.title: Chocolate
programme.desc: Johnny Depp y Juliette Binoche protagonizan esta comedia romántica dulce y sexi que enamoró al público y ganó 5 nominaciones al Óscar(r), incluso Mejor Película, que se centra en una chocolatería en un pequeño pueblo francés.

programme.title: Novia a la fuga
programme.desc: Roberts y Gere confirman su condición de eterno equipo de pantalla en esta encantadora comedia romántica llena de risas.

programme.title: Ghost: la sombra del amor
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze encarna a un fantasma que se alía con una psíquica (Whoopi Goldberg) para desenmascarar la verdad detrás de su asesinato y rescatar a su amor (Demi Moore) de un destino similar.

programme.title: Escuela para solteras
programme.desc: Amador quiere casarse con sus novia. La jefa de la familia le pone una condición: Todas las hermanas mayores que ella tienen que casarse primero y por orden de edades. Siendo su novia la menor, Amador tiene que buscarles marido a todas sus cuñadas.

programme.title: Alazán y enamorado
programme.desc: Un ranchero con temple debe lidiar con que su caballo se ha enamorado de Lady Godiva, la yegua de su vecina, una mujer fuerte y decidida. Mientras buscan una solución para el romance de sus caballos, entre ellos también surgirá el amor.

programme.title: Los hermanos del hierro
programme.desc: Reynaldo y Martín Del Hierro son testigos del asesinato de su padre por parte de Pascual Velazco. Mientras crecen, son envenenados por el deseo de venganza de su madre, pero una vez que lo consiguen cambiará sus vidas para siempre.

programme.title: Cien muchachas
programme.desc: Manuel, el dueño de una fábrica de trajes de baño, decide retirarse y quiere dejar a cargo de su compañía a uno de los dos grupos de empleados que se enfrentan entre sí en una hilarante competencia.

programme.title: Crónica de un Cobarde
programme.desc: Juan, casado con María y dueño del rancho La Troja, es asaltado y rescatado por Tomás. Al regresar, descubre que su padre ha sido asesinado por un forastero. Decidido a vengarlo, sigue la pista dejada: una espuela que pertenece a Tomás.

programme.title: La flecha envenenada (LAS)
programme.desc: Una joven huérfana es atacada por apaches y debe pagar las deudas de su padre, ya que puede ser despojada de sus tierras.

programme.title: Esos de Penjamo
programme.desc: Un ranchero se casa con su prima para que sus herederos puedan quedarse con sus propiedades cuando muera. Al no poder quedar en embarazo, su ambiciosa cuñada toma provecho de la situación.

programme.title: La vida no vale nada
programme.desc: Con una perspectiva un poco fatalista sobre la naturaleza humana y la búsqueda de la felicidad a través del amor, Pablo experimenta de manera cínica algunas relaciones sin éxito.

programme.title: Zulú
programme.desc: En un Sudáfrica post-apartheid, dos policías superan sus diferencias pasadas para unirse en la lucha contra el crimen. Una emocionante historia de redención y justicia.

programme.title: Shaft (ESP)
programme.desc: Para detener a un asesino racista, Shaft tiene que rastrear al único testigo que puede dejarlo tras las rejas. Shaft se acerca a la par del peligro.

programme.title: La hija del general
programme.desc: Existe la forma correcta, la forma equivocada y la forma del ejército. Pero bajo ninguna circunstancia, el investigador militar Paul Brenner ayudará a los oficiales de Fort MacCallum a encubrir el motivo de la muerte de una hermosa oficial.

programme.title: El asesinato de la familia Borden
programme.desc: Un thriller psicológico basado en los infames asesinatos de la familia Borden en 1892.

programme.title: Asesinato justo
programme.desc: Dos detectives veteranos de la ciudad de Nueva York (ganadores del Premio de la Academia® Robert De Niro y Al Pacino) buscan a un justiciero que puede ser uno de los suyos.

programme.title: La hija del general
programme.desc: Existe la forma correcta, la forma equivocada y la forma del ejército. Pero bajo ninguna circunstancia, el investigador militar Paul Brenner ayudará a los oficiales de Fort MacCallum a encubrir el motivo de la muerte de una hermosa oficial.

programme.title: El talentoso señor Ripley
programme.desc: Tom es un joven que cree que es mejor ser alguien de mentira a ser un verdadero Don Nadie. Un constructor naval millonario lo contrata para viajar a Italia y traer de vuelta a su hijo playboy.

programme.title: Harlem Nights (ESP)
programme.desc: Sugar Ray es el propietario de una casa de juego en Harlem. Con la ayuda de su hijo Quick, tratará de evitar que el gángster Bugsy Callhoune, que cuenta con la colaboración de un policía corrupto, se entrometa en sus negocios.

programme.title: Colores de guerra
programme.desc: Un policía experimentado y su compañero novato patrullan las calles del este de Los Ángeles mientras tratan de mantener bajo control las bandas de violencia callejera.

programme.title: Descubriendo el país de nunca jamás
programme.desc: Fantasía y realidad confluyen en este éxito memorable que explora los orígenes de una de las fábulas más maravillosas de todos los tiempos: Peter Pan. Nominada a siete Premios Óscar, incluida la mejor película.

programme.title: Juego de honor
programme.desc: Basada en una increíble historia de la vida real, Juego de Honor es un inspirado retrato del polémico entrenador de baloncesto Ken Carter.

programme.title: Amistad
programme.desc: “Amistad” es la historia de un motín en 1839 a bordo de un barco de esclavos que viaja a la costa noroeste de Estados Unidos. Gran parte de la historia tiene que ver con un drama judicial sobre el esclavo que lideró la rebelión.

programme.title: Las torres gemelas
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage y Michael Peña protagonizan a dos policías de la Autoridad Portuaria de Nueva York que quedaron atrapados entre los escombros el 11 de septiembre de 2001.

programme.title: El Castigador: zona de guerra
programme.desc: Frank Castle, alias Punisher, regresa con su estilo de justiciero solitario. Cuando Frank hiere al despiadado mafioso Billy Russoti, este jura vengarse y recluta un ejército de hombres tan peligrosos como él.

programme.title: Tirador
programme.desc: Decidido a probar su inocencia en una traición, Bob Lee Swagger se encuentra ahora en una tensa carrera contra todas las fuerzas de la ley de los Estados Unidos y contra una organización oscura que quiere verlo muerto.

programme.title: Actos de venganza
programme.desc: Un abogado de hablar rápido (Antonio Banderas) transforma su cuerpo y toma un voto de silencio, que no se romperá hasta que descubra quién mató a su esposa e hija y tenga su venganza.

programme.title: Los últimos caballeros
programme.desc: Clive Owen protagoniza esta épica aventura del arte de pelear con espadas, un guerrero caído que lucha para vengar a su deshonrado maestro (Morgan Freeman).

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: 13 horas: los soldados secretos de Bengasi
programme.desc: Del director Michael Bay, 13 horas es la historia de un grupo élite de seis ex-militares asignados para proteger a la CIA, que lucharon cuando los terroristas atacaron un complejo diplomático estadounidense el 11 de septiembre de 2012.

programme.title: Superagente Cody Banks
programme.desc: Frankie Muniz encarna a un agente juvenil de la CIA en esta mezcla de comedia y acción. Cody Banks es elegido para impedir el complot de un villano que busca apoderarse del mundo. ¡Pero primero, él debe superar su timidez hacia las chicas!

programme.title: Cody Banks: destino Londres
programme.desc: En Inglaterra, Cody Banks se hace pasar por un prodigio de la música para frustrar los planes de un agente malvado que quiere dominar el mundo con un dispositivo controlador de mentes.

programme.title: The PEBBLE AND THE PENGUIN
programme.desc: In love with Marina, the most beautiful penguin in all the land, hopeless romantic Hubie must thwart the plans of his evil rival, Drake, and win Marina’s heart in this charming, animated adventure from the creators of All Dogs Go To Heaven.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold! La película
programme.desc: Un empresario despiadado tiene un plan malvado: destruir el barrio de Arnold y construir un gran centro comercial. El tiempo es corto, y alguien debe salvarlos a todos, esa persona es Arnold.

programme.title: El último maestro del aire
programme.desc: Aire, agua, tierra, fuego. Se enfrentan cuatro naciones atadas por el destino cuando el fuego inicia la guerra contra los demás. Atrapado entre la guerra, un Avatar descubre que es capaz de manipular los cuatro elementos.

programme.title: Superagente Cody Banks
programme.desc: Frankie Muniz encarna a un agente juvenil de la CIA en esta mezcla de comedia y acción. Cody Banks es elegido para impedir el complot de un villano que busca apoderarse del mundo. ¡Pero primero, él debe superar su timidez hacia las chicas!

programme.title: Cody Banks: destino Londres
programme.desc: En Inglaterra, Cody Banks se hace pasar por un prodigio de la música para frustrar los planes de un agente malvado que quiere dominar el mundo con un dispositivo controlador de mentes.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: Una noche sin luna
programme.desc: Durante la víspera del Año Nuevo, tres personajes solitarios viajan a una pequeña ciudad perdida en el campo uruguayo y, a través de sus caminos, tendrán la oportunidad de cambiar sus destinos.

programme.title: ¿Y dónde está el policia? 33 1/3: el insulto final
programme.desc: La noche de los Óscar(r). ¿Puede alguien echar ese zoquete? ¡Esperen! No es un zoquete cualquiera, es el Tte. Frank Drebin. ¡Y se coló para detener un atentado terrorista!

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: Fútbol Kung Fu
programme.desc: En esta risueña y llamativa comedia, un equipo de inadaptados se esfuerza por ganar un campeonato mezclando artes marciales con fútbol. Utilizando un juego poco ortodoxo, se enfrentan al temido equipo malo en la batalla final por el título.

programme.title: El periodista, la leyenda de Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: En el mundo de los noticieros de los setenta, Ron Burgundy y su equipo son los líderes en San Diego. Todo marcha muy bien para los chicos hasta que ​la reportera estrella Veronica Corningstone llega para cambiar las cosas

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: El cuento de las comadrejas
programme.desc: Una actriz de la era dorada del cine argentino comparte una mansión en decadencia con tres hombres: su esposo, un guionista y un director con los que solía trabajar. Pero la llegada de dos jóvenes y la posible venta de la mansión lo cambian todo.

programme.title: Sueño en otro idioma
programme.desc: En este drama mexicano ganador de premios, una lengua indígena peligra porque sus dos últimos hablantes no se hablan desde hace más de 50 años. Martín, un lingüista joven, intentará reconciliar a los viejos amigos. Subtitulada.

programme.title: La Novia
programme.desc: Desde pequeños, Leonardo, el novio, y la novia han formado un triángulo inseparable. Sin embargo, las cosas se complican cuando el novio y la novia deciden casarse.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Gretel & Hansel: un siniestro cuento de hadas
programme.desc: En un pasado lejano, en una tierra encantada, una joven condujo a su hermanito a las profundidades del bosque en busca de comida y trabajo, y encontró el mal en su lugar.

programme.title: The Ninth Gate (LAS)
programme.desc: Roman Polanski dirige y Johnny Depp protagoniza este thriller sobrenatural sobre un vendedor de libros raros que descubre un manuscrito demoníaco.

programme.title: Los usurpadores de cuerpos
programme.desc: Bajo el amparo de las tinieblas, una ciudad duerme sin sospechar que una forma de vida alienígena está formándose para desatar un terror indescriptible, en uno de los grandes thrillers de suspenso clásicos del cine.

programme.title: Ruta 666
programme.desc: Route 666 is the thrilling story of a Federal agent whose pursuit of an escaped witness brings him directly in contact with a highway haunted by a treacherous past.

programme.title: Wishmaster: el genio del mal
programme.desc: Cuando un apreciador de joyas recibe una gema antigua, sin saberlo, desata un espíritu inmortal que concede deseos a los humanos a cambio de sus almas.

programme.title: Bajo anestesia
programme.desc: Mientras se somete a una cirugía, un joven adinerado experimenta una conciencia intraoperatoria y descubre que el equipo quirúrgico tenía la intención de asesinarlo.

programme.title: EL Ojo (2008)
programme.desc: Una chica ciega recibe un trasplante de córnea para poder recuperar la vista. Sin embargo, recibe más de lo que esperaba cuando se da cuenta de que puede ver inquietantes fantasmas.

programme.title: Gunslinger
programme.desc: When the town marshal is gunned down, his wife Rose (Beverly Garland) dons his badge. But now an evil dancehall diva (Allison Hayes) wants her dead and hires a gunslinger (John Ireland), who agrees to kill Rose...until he falls in love with her!

programme.title: Loaded Pistols
programme.desc: Seeking a man who has killed his best friend in a poker game, Gene Autry finds a cowboy hiding from a posse. The young man's gun is the murder weapon yet Gene is convinced of his innocence.

programme.title: The Strawberry Roan
programme.desc: Gene’s first color film stars Champion in the title role as a wild outlaw stallion, branded a killer, and the two-fisted cowboy who fights off a gun-crazed posse to win justice for the noble animal.

programme.title: Riders In The Sky
programme.desc: Gene Autry helps a gal clear her father's name who is accused of murdering a gambler. When the leader of the gamblers gets involved, it's up to Gene and his comic pal Pat Buttram to outwit the badmen.

programme.title: Zorro
programme.desc: In the New World, a new Spanish governor finds the province of Nueva Aragón under the iron fist of the corrupt Colonel Huerta and vows to bring justice under the guise of a masked avenger.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Cariboo Trail
programme.desc: Montanans Jim Redfern and Mike Evans head into Canada's British Columbia via the Cariboo Trail intent to raise cattle and dig for gold but find trouble instead.

programme.title: Five Guns To Tombstone
programme.desc: A reformed outlaw is living a clean life until his no-good brother who just escaped from prison ropes him into pulling a robbery. Now Billy has his own plan...to prevent it. And all he needs is his six shooters and a little luck.

programme.title: The Hitch-Hiker
programme.desc: Two fishermen pick up a psychotic escaped convict who tells them that he intends to murder them when the ride is over.

programme.title: Yours, Mine and Ours
programme.desc: When widowed nurse Helen North (Lucille Ball) meets widower Frank Beardsley (Henry Fonda), a population explosion takes place as her eight kids blend (or don't) with his ten in this chaotic, classic comedy! Van Johnson and Tom Bosley co-star.

programme.title: Greatest Show On Earth
programme.desc: Charlton Heston stars as Brad Braden, the circus manager who lives and breathes to keep the show rolling. With the Big Top about to hit rock bottom, Braden hires The Great Sebastian, a daring trapeze legend, to revitalize the circus.

programme.title: Wings

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Training camp begins at the Cowboys famous training facility, Valley Ranch. First Meeting is filled with excitement and energy until Kelli calls a special meeting of the veterans.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The "scariest night of training camp" kicks off this dramatic episode as the girls learn the dreaded jumpsplit! It's mind over body, as the girls attempt this famed and required move.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies are really challenged when guest choreographer DJ Guthrie teaches them a new dance style. Kelli and Judy have some tough decisions to make about who will remain on the squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The training camp candidates hold their breath as the one and only Kitty Carter pays a visit to training camp. Kitty takes no prisoners as she rips into the new girls as well as the vets.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With their futures on the line, the training camp candidates try to push through their heightened emotions to show Kelli and Judy they deserve to be part of America's Sweethearts. Unfortunately, for some "Tonight will be your last night".

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This is it, the last chance, as the girls finally learn their fate. Dreams start coming true as the girls pose for Squad Photo. There is some great dancing as Show Group and the rest of the squad perform for the first time at a new "Meet The Team" event.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Begin the journey to see who will survive the most demanding dance audition in professional sports. 500 ladies put their dreams on the line as they try to become a famed Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, for the 2014-2015 season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With 55 high caliber girls making it to finals, it's intimidating for the 30 veterans as they join the audition process & must fight to keep their place. Kitty Carter takes no prisoners as she prepares girls for their solos.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As training camp begins with 43 ladies, the pressure starts to build! Kelli's passion is infectious and intimidating in First Meeting, as she sets the expectations very high. Seven girls will be cut to make a squad of 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Fear takes over for the new Training Camp Candidates as they face the reality of doing the DCC kick line & jump splits for the first time. Dreams come true if only temporarily, as the girls try on the uniform for the first time.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: To be a DCC, you need to look like a DCC. This week Kelli makes sure all the girls have the look. The final rehearsal of the week brings emotions to the forefront as a girl gets sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the candidates enter the sixth week of training camp they need to start looking like a DCC or their spot is in jeopardy. Melissa Rycroft and former DCC Tina Kalina sit in for Judy and give Kelli some fresh eyes.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With three girls left to cut and the first game around the corner, the pressure is intense as the girls return to AT&T Stadium to take the field for the first time since auditions.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The final day of training camp has everyone nervous because Kelli and Judy might take a squad of less than 36.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: This season 400 hundred girls that have dared to dream they can become a world-famous Dallas Cowboys Cheerleader, put it all on the line, as preliminary auditions for the 2015-2016 season begin.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Talent and looks alone won't get you on the squad. Dreams are made and hopes are crushed as only 46 out of 59 candidates make it into Training Camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As Training Camp starts Kelli lays down the law. Girls start to crack as the reality of how hard it is to become a DCC sets in. Melissa Rycroft offers hope and advice on how to make it through.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy must cut 10 girls to get to the magic number of 36 for the squad. Uniform Fittings gives Kelli a better idea of who has the whole package. As the cuts begin so does emotional end of dreams.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Ohio investigators search for answers in the decades-old murder of 10-year-old Amy Mihaljevic; a retracing of Amy's steps from the day of the kidnapping.

programme.title: I Love New York: Flowers from Fishburne
programme.desc: Now down to 15 men, New York invites the guys to a pond where they must prove their love by swimming to her and presenting her with a gift.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Stolen Date
programme.desc: With 12 guys left, some of the boys play a prank on a few of the less popular men that keeps them up all night.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nobody Likes a Snitch
programme.desc: New York has barely wiped the morning out of her eyes when a fight breaks out between two of her boys. Although NY can be a tolerant person, violence is non-negotiable and she is faced with the tough decision to let a guy go.

programme.title: I Love New York: Blood Oath Gone Bad
programme.desc: After snitching, fighting, and spitting, and nearly getting eliminated, one man is the house enemy and anxiously waits for an opportunity to redeem himself.

programme.title: I Love New York: Nip/Suck
programme.desc: New York surprises the guys with the return of one man. Another man is unhappy as his world is suddenly turned upside down and he literally fears for his life.

programme.title: I Love New York: I Still Have Love for New York
programme.desc: New York invites the remaining six guys' exes to the house and this time, there's a special twist involved. She's bringing two of HER exes, Chance and Real, to help dig up some dirt on her guys.

programme.title: I Love New York: Mind Games
programme.desc: With 5 guys left, New York wants to find out who's the most compatible with her and who's just plain crazy, when she takes the boys for a psych test.

programme.title: I Love New York: Meet the Parents
programme.desc: With only four guys left it's time to clean house, literally. New York has invited some special guests-the guy's parents, so she gets her boys to scour and scrub her house for their arrival.

programme.title: I Love New York: Miami Thrice
programme.desc: After the last elimination, New York tells her final three men to pack their bags because they're heading to Miami!

programme.title: I Love New York: Clip Show
programme.desc: In this 30-minute special episode, NY hosts a look back at hilarious, never-before-seen moments with our favorite guys from the series.

programme.title: I Love New York: Rasta Finale
programme.desc: After a season of ups and downs and a tense elimination in Miami, it's down to New York's final two suitors. They accompany New York to the tropics of Jamaica for the final showdown.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Sumthin's Stinkin' in the House of Flav
programme.desc: Flavor Flav welcomes 20 new women to his mansion with the hope of finding someone “real” this time around.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav is Blind
programme.desc: Flavor Flav challenges his remaining fourteen Flavorettes to a blind speed dating competition (to get to know them without the influence of “physicality-ness”).

programme.title: Flavor of Love: She Works Hard for Her Honey
programme.desc: Twelve girls are left and jealousy is running rampant. Flav divides the girls into groups of six and presents them with two challenges.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya has someone on her mind, and is questioning the house rules Mrs. Matlin has set.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Prom is fast approaching, but Clare is MIA from committee meetings.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig is hesitant to let Maya see his new place.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zig learns the truth behind some recent events, and now he’s an accomplice to a crime.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Vince has taken Zig in and treated him like family, but his actions have put Zig, and now even Maya, in harm’s way.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s prom time at Degrassi and in a last-minute shot to save his night, Drew plans an elaborate prom-posal.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew agrees to help Dallas salvage Prom and is punished.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya fails her CPR and now she can’t spend the summer lifeguarding at the beach with Zig.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone’s spooked by Gloria’s disappearance as strange things continue to happen.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Determined to get to the bottom of Mr. Bane’s creepy info trove, Zoe and Grace break into his car only to discover more incriminating evidence.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe attempts to ward off her feelings for an unlikely candidate by leaning into a romance a familiar face.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Arthur feels rejected when his father continues to see more and more of a new girlfriend.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: B.L.T. fights with an upperclassman who makes a racist comment. Later, when he asks Michelle to the dance, her parents forbid her to go with him because he is black.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Alexa's parents won't let her have a party, Lucy offers to host one instead, since her parents are going away.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: The third term at Degrassi Junior High ends with a bang. Wheels passes algebra, but Spike is not so lucky.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: When Stephanie uses her new-found sexuality to campaign for the school presidency, her best friend questions her motivation and her methods. Meanwhile, Stephanie's younger brother Arthur is having difficulty adjusting to grade seven.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Voula disobeys her Old World father and sneaks out to the school dance. But when Stephanie gets too drunk to deliver her speech, Voula has to take over, risking exposure of her deception.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Feeling unfairly treated by Mr. Raditch, Yick puts his name on an old paper of Stephanie's to test his teacher's response. Meanwhile, Joey sells phony drugs to Melanie and Kathleen.

programme.title: Degrassi Junior High
programme.desc: Rick, the school tough guy, is a loner who rarely speaks to anyone. When Joey visits Rick's home, he is horrified to discover that his new friend's bruises are inflicted by his own father. Joey wants to help but doesn’t want to betray Rick's confidence.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen-year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After months of flirting via e-mail, thirteen year-old Emma's new love interest, Jordan, is going to be in town. Coincidentally (fatefully?), it's the same night as her mother's high school reunion.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley has set her sights on becoming Degrassi's School President. Toby, spurred on by their awkward new situation as step-siblings, is frustrated by her unchallenged status and convinces JT to run against her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Terri's sure that no guy will ever want her and she wants to skip the school dance. Spinner seems interested in her though, and Ashley and Paige convince her to let them make her over.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Toby can't stand the idea of Parents Night - the last time his divorced parents were in the same room they had a huge, embarrassing fight.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ashley and Jimmy's eight-month anniversary is coming up - and so is the question of whether or not to have sex. Paige is playing Juliet opposite Jimmy's English-class Romeo and she's planting doubts in Ashley's mind.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jimmy desperately wants to make the basketball team. But, surprisingly, it looks like Sean is surpassing him as a possible star player.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a long absence overseas, Ashley's dad is back in town. She's enjoying his company and attention, but something tells her there's a piece of his life that's being kept from her.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Animatronics, computer animation and science re-create the dinosaurs' world.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the coelophysis and the diplodocus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the opthalmosaurus and the ornithocheirus.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs: Shortbites
programme.desc: Featured species are the leaellynasaura and the tyrannosaurus.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Special effects-filled documentary beginning 49 million years ago. The world is heavily forested and birds rule the planet, preying on small mammals. Whales have not yet evolved and their ancestors walk on the land.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today, Dog's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills to track his prey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a big-hearted guy. He's helping Mary Ellen, his friend and fellow bondsman, on a dangerous night hunt for a fugitive she is now regretting bailing out. He's also giving his nephew Justin a second chance to rejoin the team.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Things are seldom what they seem in the world of bounty hunting. When the fugitive's girlfriend offers to help Dog trap this dangerous felon, Dog knows that someone is being deceived, the only question is whom?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that looks can be deceiving. The fugitive is pretty, petite, and trouble. She stands accused of settling an argument with the help of a box cutter. What Dog does not anticipate is how deceptive this femme fatale can truly be!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What do you do when you have a fugitive you not only want to find, but believe can be helped back onto the straight and narrow? If you're Mary Ellen, you call your good friend Dog.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Duty calls and the Chapmans are off on a hunt. The team chases a fugitive who has disappeared into a world of "no known" addresses.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Beth returns to the compound on the Big Island, she finds a damaged SUV and two possible culprits--Dog or Justin. Pressed by Beth, Dog offers a third option. The perpetrators are Hawaii's mythical mischief makers--the Menehune!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's been quite a while since Tim Chapman put down his mace can and bulletproof vest to care for his growing family. When his old friend Dog calls asking for help tracking an elusive felon, Tim jumps into action.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With the aid of the runner's girlfriend, the posse heads out to bring a client with a checkered past in. Little does the team suspect that before the end of the day, Dog will be helping to mend a family torn apart by violence.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog tracks a fugitive who is on the run from the law for the first time. Reading the file Dog knows the young man's life is at the crossroads. Will he be able to track down this wanna-be-gansta in time to convince him to make the right choice?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For a guy who started life as a free spirited outlaw-biker, Dog has certainly turned into a family man. His children touch everything he does today, from searching for the perfect gift for his daughter Cecily's birthday to hunting a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The hunt for an elusive and clever criminal takes Dog through the world of a bantam fighting cock, a pregnant daughter, and a jungle safe house go together. And don't forget the mopeds as well as a group of hostile squatters on government land!

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For Dog and Beth, it's not only another day in paradise, it's their anniversary. Beth is hoping for a romantic dinner with her man, but she knows only too well that for Dog work always comes first.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today Dog finds himself looking for more than one fugitive. He starts the day looking for a woman who has skipped out on her court date. But he soon learns that she has teamed up with a woman whose criminal exploits have attracted the local media.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog gave a break to a young man with a drug problem who promised to enter drug rehab. But this commitment to rehabilitation seems to have ended when he bolted from the car on the way to the drug treatment center and went on the run.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest fugitive doesn't think small when it comes to illegal drugs: he was carrying almost a pound of meth when he was arrested. Now he's on the run with his pregnant girlfriend on the high plains of Colorado.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Hawaii and tracking a dangerous fugitive through the jungles of the Big Island. Their prey is being protected by a ring of family and friends that Dog must forcefully confront to bring in his man.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When Dog decides to spend the day caring for his newest granddaughter, Beth enlists the girls to hunt down a female fugitive. Heading into a dangerous part of town, the ladies will use their feminine wiles to track this mother gone wrong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his old friends, Tim Chapman and Sonny Westbrook are riding with the team, so their target, a thief with violent tendencies, is out of luck. When Dog learns that the fugitive is also a disrespectful son, he is more motivated to find his man.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Middle Eastern oilman Farouk, anxious for vengeance against Blake, tells Nick that Carrington is responsible for the death of his brother. Nick attacks Blake, who is left unconscious at the bottom of a deep ravine.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle finds Blake in the mountains and gets him to the hospital. Nick Toscanni disappears. Cecil is also brought to the hospital, and he's very weak. A police investigation is started to find the baby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Michael goes to Denver to find out who he is. Alexis and Cecil plan a wedding in the hospital. Claudia disappears and Blake suspects her of kidnapping the baby. There's an exciting drama on the roof of a tall building.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The baby is recovered from the real kidnapper, Alfred Grimes, and it turns out he's the father of Roger Grimes. Fallon fires Susan. Claudia leaves for a sanitarium. Fallon starts looking for a job. Blake gives her his hotel La Mirada.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Cecil leaves his estate and Colbyco to Jeff and Alexis. He also reveals his "Rhinewood" game to Blake at the reading of his will. Blake suspects Alexis of being a part of it.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gives her newfound long-lost son Adam a job at Colbyco. Blake starts to believe that Adam may actually be his real son. Fallon and Adam keep flirting with each other, not knowing they are siblings. Adam has dinner with Krystle and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake tries to be friends with Adam, but Adam rejects him. Alexis tells Mark that he's still married to Krystle. Mark seeks to get a job as a tennis pro at Fallon's hotel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from Congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with the so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Indonesia but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior. Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the 1996 murder of Seattle residents Raquel Rivera and Jay Johnson, evidence from the couple's dog eventually ties one of the murderers to the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two eyewitnesses may hold the key to the death of a motorcycle gang member.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police get a clue about a couple who disappeared on Memorial Day weekend during an in-progress robbery. The evidence found solves a brutal crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Foul play is suspected when Fort Worth factory worker Glenda Furch disappears after completing her shift.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fire erupts in Kings Cross Station in London, killing 31 people and injuring dozens more. Investigators pinpoint the cause of the fire, but it takes state-of-the-art technology and fluid dynamics experts to explain why it became a deadly inferno.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The woman had been sexually assaulted, stabbed repeatedly and left for dead. When a perfect suspect practically turned himself in, police were sure they had their man — until DNA evidence proved them wrong.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A serial rapist is on the loose in a Texas town. No one knew where he'd strike next, but the audacity of his attacks and the escalation of violence against his victims made finding him imperative.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman falls to her death from a cliff overlooking the ocean. Initially, investigators think it was a tragic accident. But after a forensic examination, police uncover a very different picture of what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After 10 bodies turn up in Florida, one victim — 17-year-old Lisa McVey — is abducted but released. She leads police to the perpertrator, Bobbie Joe Long.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1991, Grand Junction, Colorado is on edge after a series of deadly bombings kill two people and injure one more. Police race to find the culprit before he strikes again.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The crime scene was especially violent: a husband and wife had been shot to death in their bedroom. Was their 16-year-old daughter complicit?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the early hours of a morning just before Christmas, a college student was abducted from the parking lot of her apartment. Her body was found later that day; she had been sexually assaulted and shot at point-blank range.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Bombings are difficult to solve because the perpetrator isn't usually at the scene and the evidence goes up in smoke. In this case, pieces of plastic the size of grains of sand hold the key to finding a murderer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After shooting his victims in the head, the killer staged the scene, placed the incriminating evidence into a plastic bag and tossed it into the river.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police suspect Dr. John "Jack" Boyle in the disappearance of his wife, Noreen, when he signs mortgage papers for a new house with a woman pretending to be his spouse. The police later find Noreen's body in the basement of Dr. Boyle's new house.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was a tragic twist of fate. Just days after a woman sold her home and moved to a modest trailer, a fire took both the trailer and her life. But the autopsy proved this was no accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A healthy young man dies mysteriously in his sleep and toxicology tests reveal a lethal dose of lidocaine in his blood. Investigators find a suicide note and presume he killed himself until a forensic linguist examines the note.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in a Mexican resort draws law enforcement resources on both sides of the border. At first glance, the motive appears to be robbery, but careful analysis of the forensic evidence points to something more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: At the scene of a vicious murder, the killer went to a great deal of effort to wipe away his fingerprints and obscure his shoe impressions left when he tracked blood trails on the floor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Alaskan hikers discover a body wrapped in sheets which were edged in orange stitching. Investigators find a tuft of red carpet fibers clinging to the sheet — threads of evidence which lead them straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Algunas de las mejores pistas provienen de los lugares menos probables. Los crímenes más difíciles se han resuelto y delincuentes han sido traicionados a través de la evidencia proporcionada por insectos y botellas de cerveza.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Nunca hay una buena razón para matar, pero algunos asesinos son particularmente brutales. Eligen a sus víctimas sin motivo y luego cubren la evidencia con astucia. Aun así, quedan pistas cruciales.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Estos casos tardaron una década o más en resolverse. No hay un estatuto de limitaciones para asesinatos. Cuando el caso se enfría, las pistas se vuelven escasas. Los investigadores deben usar la ciencia para cerrar los casos inconclusos.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Los incendios intencionales se inician para beneficio propio o para cubrir un crimen diferente, como un asesinato. Pero si crees que el fuego consume todas las pistas, piénsalo dos veces.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI

programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y mientras esta al filo de la muerte revalora su vida desde sus inicios recordando una parte de su infancia, la que busca esclarecer una vez recuperada su salud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se topa de manera inesperada con su Némesis de la infancia y junto con Gaspar se embarca en una cruzada para recuperar un objeto muy preciado de manos de su archienemigo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Este capitulo completo es una sátira de la típica historia de telenovelas que ha puesto a México en el mapa como el mas su fuerte exponente, sin reflejar necesariamente algún estándar de calidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe una visita inesperada con una noticia que le cambiara la vida. Mientras tanto Jonathan le ayuda a Peluzín para prepararse para una prueba muy importante.

programme.desc: The Beatles, the world's most iconic rock and roll band, changed pop culture forever when they traveled to America. Explore the legacy of Paul, John, George and Ringo in this documentary.

programme.title: The Beatles: In the Life
programme.desc: Shooting onto the scene in the early 60's, The Beatles took the world by storm. Their fame was new, massive and continues to this day. They are still the best-selling band of all time 183 million sales world wide.

programme.title: America's Sweethearts: The Queens of Nashville
programme.desc: Chronicles the incredible careers of five country music superstars from their unassuming beginnings to the world's largest stages, with special antidotes from the artists themselves, friends, family and their influence on other artists.

programme.title: Becoming Queen
programme.desc: Led by the incomparable voice and showmanship of Freddie Mercury, Queen pioneered a unique brand of operatic rock that perfectly encapsulated the decadent excess of the 1970s. This documentary traces the history of the band.

programme.title: Beyonce: Queen B
programme.desc: One of the most recognizable figures in contemporary music, Beyoncé rose to fame as the central member of pop-R&B group Destiny's Child before embarking on a multi-platinum, record-breaking solo career in 2001.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Queen of Country
programme.desc: Dolly Parton is the most honoured female country performer of all time. She has had 25 songs reach No1 on the Billboard Country charts, a record for female artists. She has 41 career top 10 country albums, a record for any artist.

programme.title: Freddie Mercury: The King of Queen
programme.desc: Renowned as one of the greatest performers of the 20th century Freddie Mercury pushed the boundaries of art and music as he lead his band Queen to international stardom.

programme.title: Music Talks: Queen Latifah
programme.desc: Music industry titan Andre Harrell sits down with the legendary Queen Latifah for an inside look at her journey through the avenues of the entertainment industry.

programme.title: Queen: How They Broke Free
programme.desc: Few bands have ever come close to achieving the same stature of greatness as Queen. Their ability to dominate and amaze audiences was relentless.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta

programme.desc: The crew arrives in Trinidad. Karlie checks Tokyo and Shekinah. Joc, Kirk, and Scrappy go on a jungle adventure. Pooh airs out Karlie's dirty laundry. Akbar and Scrapp help Che through a personal crisis.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta

programme.title: Shadowlands

programme.title: Into the Blue

programme.title: Galapagos

programme.title: Wild Workers

programme.desc: The species of Madagascar have evolved over millions of years in isolation.
